top_frustrations.title: Excessive Ad Frequency
top_frustrations.description: Users are frustrated with the excessive ad frequency, which disrupts their listening experience.
supporting_evidence: top much ads man,earlier it was one will pop up after every song, freaking annoying but i could still manage now atleast three consecutive ads are coming one after another
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Reduce ad frequency to improve user experience and reduce frustration.

top_frustrations.title: App Crashes and Bugs
top_frustrations.description: Users are frustrated with app crashes and bugs, which disrupt their listening experience and cause frustration.
supporting_evidence: it is crashing too much although i have subscription to it... it crashes all the time.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Fix app crashes and improve overall app stability to improve user experience.

top_frustrations.title: Poor Music Discovery
top_frustrations.description: Users are frustrated with the poor music discovery features, which make it difficult to find new music and artists.
supporting_evidence: The app is getting more worse than before we can't play previous songs, we can't choose the song by ourselves means every basic feature has been locked and it's just forcing to take the premium
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Improve music discovery features by enhancing recommendation algorithms and providing more exposure to new artists.

top_frustrations.title: Limited Offline Mode
top_frustrations.description: Users are frustrated with the limited offline mode, which does not allow them to listen to music without an internet connection.
supporting_evidence: I've been a premium Spotify user fo some years now but for some reason, i can't open my app when my phone isn't connected to the internet.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Improve offline mode by allowing users to download music for offline playback and reducing loading times.

top_frustrations.title: Poor Customer Support
top_frustrations.description: Users are frustrated with the poor customer support, which does not provide helpful solutions to their problems.
supporting_evidence: Never had an issue before, but recently changed phones and the app won't start ? and is very slow if it does open. is this a known issue? I hope it can be fixed soon.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Improve customer support by increasing response times and providing more helpful solutions.

feature_requests.title: Ad-Free Experience
feature_requests.description: Users want an ad-free experience, or at least the option to pay for one, as the current ad frequency is frustrating.
supporting_evidence: top much ads man,earlier it was one will pop up after every song, freaking annoying but i could still manage now atleast three consecutive ads are coming one after another
feature_requests.recommended_action: Offer an ad-free option, or reduce ad frequency to improve user experience.

feature_requests.title: Offline Mode Improvement
feature_requests.description: Users want to be able to listen to music offline without interruptions, and with better download management.
supporting_evidence: I've been a premium Spotify user fo some years now but for some reason, i can't open my app when my phone isn't connected to the internet.
Extremely slow and incompetent app. The loading times are crazy and you need the fastest Internet connection possible just to get decent download speeds.
feature_requests.recommended_action: Improve offline mode by allowing users to download music for offline playback and reducing loading times.

feature_requests.title: Enhanced Playlist Management
feature_requests.description: Users want better playlist management features, such as the ability to choose specific songs and manage large playlists.
supporting_evidence: All cute and nice on the first week, then, it shows it's true colors. Forced to listen to a Playlist in shuffle? Hell nah, instant-unistall.
feature_requests.recommended_action: Enhance playlist management features by allowing users to choose specific songs and manage large playlists more efficiently.

feature_requests.title: Improved Music Discovery
feature_requests.description: Users want better music discovery features, such as improved recommendations and more exposure to new artists.
supporting_evidence: The app is getting more worse than before we can't play previous songs, we can't choose the song by ourselves means every basic feature has been locked and it's just forcing to take the premium
feature_requests.recommended_action: Improve music discovery features by enhancing recommendation algorithms and providing more exposure to new artists.

feature_requests.title: Better Customer Support
feature_requests.description: Users want better customer support, including more responsive and helpful support teams.
supporting_evidence: Never had an issue before, but recently changed phones and the app won't start ? and is very slow if it does open. is this a known issue? I hope it can be fixed soon.
feature_requests.recommended_action: Improve customer support by increasing response times and providing more helpful solutions.

quick_wins.title: Fix App Crashes
quick_wins.description: Fix app crashes and improve overall app stability to improve user experience.
supporting_evidence: it is crashing too much although i have subscription to it... it crashes all the time.
quick_wins.recommended_action: Fix app crashes and improve overall app stability to improve user experience.

quick_wins.title: Reduce Ad Frequency
quick_wins.description: Reduce ad frequency to improve user experience and reduce frustration.
supporting_evidence: top much ads man,earlier it was one will pop up after every song, freaking annoying but i could still manage now atleast three consecutive ads are coming one after another
quick_wins.recommended_action: Reduce ad frequency to improve user experience and reduce frustration.

quick_wins.title: Improve Customer Support
quick_wins.description: Improve customer support by increasing response times and providing more helpful solutions.
supporting_evidence: Never had an issue before, but recently changed phones and the app won't start ? and is very slow if it does open. is this a known issue? I hope it can be fixed soon.
quick_wins.recommended_action: Improve customer support by increasing response times and providing more helpful solutions.

long_term_opportunities.title: Personalized Music Experience
long_term_opportunities.description: Develop a more personalized music experience by incorporating AI-powered recommendations and user behavior analysis.
supporting_evidence: ai slop is getting abundant.. it was pretty good for the first few years. now with price increase i'm not seeing the value anymore...
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Invest in AI-powered recommendation technology to create a more personalized music experience.

long_term_opportunities.title: Expanded Music Catalog
long_term_opportunities.description: Expand the music catalog to include more regional and local music, as well as improve discovery features for these genres.
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Expand the music catalog to include more regional and local music, and improve discovery features for these genres.

long_term_opportunities.title: Improved User Interface
long_term_opportunities.description: Redesign the user interface to be more intuitive and user-friendly, with a focus on discovery and playlist management.
supporting_evidence: The lyrics function is not working. This used to be a reliable feature, but now it barely works.
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Redesign the user interface to be more intuitive and user-friendly, with a focus on discovery and playlist management.
